headings: INSTRUCTIONS FOR INVOICING AND COMPLETION OF THE APPLICATION FOR PAYMENT FORM
text: 2. Each line of Application for Payment (Exhibit B, Page 2) must be filled out. If each line is not filled out, it will be returned to  Subcontractor  for  corrections/completion.  Subcontractor  must  submit  a  complete  Schedule  of  Values  (equal  to  the subcontract  amount  indicated  on  page  1  of  the  Subcontract)  to  be  approved  by  Contractor  on  the  Continuation  Sheet (Exhibit B, Page 3) at time of Subcontract execution, and each month thereafter to include percentages billed by line item for the period work was performed.
